description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to test with Python 3.10, 3.9, 3.8, and 3.7 on an ubuntu-latest environment. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, cache pip dependencies based on setup.py and tox.ini, install tox, and run tox with the py environment.
